name: Theravance Biopharma, Inc.
description: Theravance Biopharma, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of organ-selective medicines. The company aims to transform the treatment of serious respiratory and inflammatory diseases by delivering innovative therapies that improve the lives of patients and caregivers. Headquartered in South San Francisco, California, with its legal domicile in the Cayman Islands, Theravance Biopharma leverages its expertise in drug discovery to address significant unmet medical needs, including the commercialization of its respiratory product, YUPELRI, for the treatment of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
